ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that collected the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Weather outlook (e.g., sunny, overcast, rainy) */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature (e.g., hot, mild, cool) */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity (e.g., high, normal) */,
  "wind" INTEGER /* Presence of wind (True/False) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation (e.g., in millimeters) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Speed of the wind (e.g., in kilometers per hour) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (e.g., in hPa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_outlook FOREIGN KEY ("outlook") REFERENCES outlooks ("outlook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_humidity FOREIGN KEY ("humidity") REFERENCES humidities ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_temperature FOREIGN KEY ("temperature") REFERENCES temperatures ("temperature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlooks" (
  "outlook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather outlook */,
  "outlook_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather outlook (e.g., sunny, overcast, rainy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather outlook */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather outlook (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature category */,
  "temperature_name" TEXT /* Name of the temperature category (e.g., hot, mild, cool) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the temperature category */,
  "range" TEXT /* Temperature range (e.g., 20-30°C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidities" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity category */,
  "humidity_name" TEXT /* Name of the humidity category (e.g., high, normal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the humidity category */,
  "range" TEXT /* Humidity range (e.g., 70-80%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being considered */,
  "weather_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data used for the decision */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision on whether to hold the event (yes/no) */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the weather forecast used for the decision */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, festival) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_decisions_weather_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
